title: Language update notifications
scenario: Verify language update notifications appear when the app is in the background during a headset language update.
steps: Select one of the supported languages (a popup window should appear).
Click "Update now" — the "Software update: Three easy steps" screen should show with animation. The headset language should change after a successful update.
Put the app in the background.
expected: When the app is put in the background, a notification "Device update in progress" should appear. Upon successful update, a notification "Device is updated" should be seen.
